vocab.meaning: ốc đảo yên bình (giữa sự ồn ào)
vocab.example: Finding a tranquil oasis like a hidden garden helps me escape the relentless grind of city life.

vocab.meaning: trung tâm giao lưu xã hội (nơi náo nhiệt)
vocab.example: I occasionally visit a local social hub on weekends to catch up with friends and enjoy the high-energy atmosphere.

vocab.meaning: sự an yên và thanh thản
vocab.example: I generally gravitate towards the outskirts of the city to find some solace and serenity away from the crowds.

vocab.meaning: bầu không khí sôi động, đầy sức sống
vocab.example: The vibrant atmosphere of a night market is truly infectious, making it a great place to soak up the local culture.

vocab.meaning: địa điểm có phong cảnh đẹp (thường yên tĩnh)
vocab.example: My idea of a perfect weekend is driving to a remote scenic spot where I can clear my mind.

vocab.meaning: đám đông ồn ào, náo nhiệt
vocab.example: I tend to avoid stadiums or large concerts because I find navigating through a raucous crowd quite draining.

vocab.meaning: nơi ẩn dật/nghỉ ngơi hòa bình
vocab.example: A lakeside cabin provides the ultimate peaceful retreat for anyone looking to decompress after a stressful week.

vocab.meaning: sự hối hả và nhộn nhịp
vocab.example: Sometimes I enjoy the hustle and bustle of downtown, as it makes me feel connected to the pulse of the city.
The quietude of the temple stood in stark contrast to the noisy construction work happening just outside its walls.

vocab.meaning: trạng thái thiền định/suy ngẫm sâu
vocab.example: I prefer quiet art galleries because they allow me to enter a meditative state while appreciating the masterpieces.
